data.body: Add or update a Security section in the README (or a dedicated SECURITY.md) that describes: (1) how the OpenRouter API key is stored, (2) safety precautions in place (file permissions, keychain, masked display), (3) unmitigated risks users should be aware of (local plaintext before keychain migration, localhost transport, etc.), and (4) best practices for key management.
data.title: Document OpenRouter API key security in README
